channel.title: Naija Digest Online
channel.description: Nigeria’s one-stop hub for breaking news, tech, football, celebrity gossip, Naija music, live TV, exchange rates and trending topics.

item.title: World Population Day: Radda pledges data-driven development in Katsina
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Katsina State Governor Dikko Radda commits to data-driven development, using accurate population statistics to improve services and transform the youthful
Read More: https://punchng.com/world-population-day-radda-pledges-data-driven-development-in-katsina/

item.title: US lawmaker says armed Israeli settlers detained him in West Bank
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
US Congressman Ro Khanna claims he was detained by armed Israeli settlers in the West Bank, with the Israeli military allegedly complicit. Read more on thi
Read More: https://punchng.com/us-lawmaker-says-armed-israeli-settlers-detained-him-in-west-bank/

item.title: IPCR lauds Tinubu, security chiefs over rescue of abducted Oyo pupils
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
The IPCR commends President Tinubu and security chiefs for the successful rescue of abducted Oyo pupils, highlighting commitment to national security and i
Read More: https://punchng.com/ipcr-lauds-tinubu-security-chiefs-over-rescue-of-abducted-oyo-pupils/

item.title: US-based Nigerian prof bags NiDCOM diaspora merit award
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Professor Hakeem Tijani, a US-based Nigerian academic, receives the prestigious NiDCOM National Diaspora Merit Award 2026 for his contributions to educatio
Read More: https://punchng.com/us-based-nigerian-prof-bags-nidcom-diaspora-merit-award/

item.title: NELFUND debunks report of suspension of student upkeep allowances
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
NELFUND dismisses fake reports about the suspension of student upkeep allowances for the 2025/2026 academic session. Get official updates on the student lo
Read More: https://punchng.com/nelfund-debunks-report-of-suspension-of-student-upkeep-allowances/

item.title: Edo LG poll: 30-year-old wins Ovia South West
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
A 30-year-old APC candidate, Anthony Osarobo, has won the Edo LG poll in Ovia South West, becoming one of the youngest chairmen elected.
Read More: https://punchng.com/edo-lg-poll-30-year-old-wins-ovia-south-west/

item.title: Remi Tinubu empowers 800 women, unveils Kogi treasury house
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
First Lady Remi Tinubu empowers over 800 women in Kogi State with grants and materials, and inaugurates new treasury house and healthcare centre.
Read More: https://punchng.com/remi-tinubu-empowers-800-women-unveils-kogi-treasury-house/

item.title: Police arrest 14 suspected drug dealers, seize illicit drugs in Yobe raid
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Yobe State Police Command arrests 14 suspected drug dealers and seizes over 300 sachets of illicit drugs in a major raid in Jakusko LGA.
Read More: https://punchng.com/police-arrest-14-suspected-drug-dealers-seize-illicit-drugs-in-yobe-raid/

item.title: Police nab armed robbery suspect in Abia
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Abia State Police Command arrests Chidera Okorie, 22, for armed robbery using a lighter resembling a pistol. Investigation ongoing in Abia.
Read More: https://punchng.com/police-nab-armed-robbery-suspect-in-abia/

item.title: Oyebamiji lauds Tinubu, NSA over rescue of Oyo pupils, teachers
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Bola Oyebamiji commends President Tinubu and NSA Ribadu for the successful rescue of abducted Oyo pupils and teachers after a 56-day ordeal.
Read More: https://punchng.com/oyebamiji-lauds-tinubu-nsa-over-rescue-of-oyo-pupils-teachers/

item.title: Notorious bandit commander, Kachalla Sani Yellow eliminated
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: A notorious bandit commander, identified as Kachalla Sani Yellow, has been killed during a security operation in Anka Local Government Area of Zamfara State. Yellow was reportedly responsible for coordinating several attacks along the Anka–Bagega Road. He was killed during an armed confrontation inv

item.title: Noskova Outclasses Muchova To Win Wimbledon Title
item.dc:creator: Completesports
item.description: Czech youngster Linda Noskova was at her best form as she recovered from missing five championship points to beat Karolina Muchova in Saturday’s Wimbledon final. The 21-year-old ninth seed blew five championship points in the second set before holding her nerve to secure a 6-2, 5-7, 6-3 victor

item.title: President Federation Cup: El-Kanemi Warriors claim fourth title with win over Ikorodu City
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: El-Kanemi Warriors claimed the President Federation Cup after a hard-fought 1-0 victory over Ikorodu City in Asaba on Saturday. Muktar Ismail scored the decisive goal from the penalty spot in the 13th minute. It was El-Kanemi Warriors’ second President Federation Cup title in the last&#16

item.title: Police Probe Death Of South Africa World Cup Midfielder Adams
item.dc:creator: The Whistler
item.description: Police in South Africa have opened an investigation into the death of South Africa and Mamelodi Sundowns midfielder Jayden Adams, 25, whose body was found at a house in Schotschekloof, a suburb in central Cape Town, on Saturday morning. Adams died just weeks after featuring for his country at the Wo

item.title: Senate panel probes alleged $71.65m, N30.7bn unpaid oil firms’ contributions to NDDC
item.dc:creator: Premium Times
item.description: The committee's action followed a petition submitted by an environmental activist, who raised concerns over the persistent refusal of some oil companies to fulfil their statutory obligations to the Niger Delta region. The post Senate panel probes alleged $71.65m, N30.7bn unpaid oil firms’ cont

item.title: Guehi and Stones set to start for England in World Cup quarter-final
item.dc:creator: BBC Sport Football
item.description: Marc Guehi has won his fitness race and is expected to be fit for England's World Cup quarter-final against Norway, with John Stones set to play alongside the central defender.

item.title: Our Southern Kaduna Peace Effort Was Blocked —SOKAPU
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: The Southern Kaduna Peoples’ United Associations (SOKAPU) has said its attempt to formally declare readiness for reconciliation and dialogue over the protracted leadership crisis in Southern Kaduna was aborted after its National President, Engr. Samuel Tabara Kato, was allegedly prevented from

item.title: ‘It’s heartbreaking’: My brother claimed Social Security at 70. He died from cancer after one payment. Why wait to claim?
item.dc:creator: MarketWatch
item.description: “I’ve always been a little skeptical of the government’s encouragement to delay claiming benefits.”

item.title: World Cup: France legend slams Portugal players over Ronaldo treatment
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: French legend, Youri Djorkaeff, has criticised Portugal players over their treatment of their captain, Cristiano Ronaldo. He said the Portugal team effectively ‘boycotted’ Cristiano Ronaldo during the 2026 FIFA World Cup. The 58-year-old, who scored 28 goals and provided 21 assists in 82

item.title: Population vs. Planning: How Cape Verde built a World Cup blueprint Africa cannot ignore
item.dc:creator: Premium Times
item.description: Cape Verde arrived at the 2026 FIFA World Cup as the tournament's smallest nation by population. It left as one of its defining stories. This feature explores how a nation of just over half a million people built a team capable of challenging the world's elite—and why its journey offers timely lesso

item.title: NELFUND debunks fake upkeep suspension notice
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: The Nigerian Education Loan Fund (NELFUND) has dismissed as fake a social media document claiming that upkeep allowances under the Federal Government’s Student Loan Scheme for the 2025/2026 academic session were suspended. The post NELFUND debunks fake upkeep suspension notice appeared first on Vang

item.title: Oregon’s Attorney General withdraws effort to delay Paramount and Warner Bros. merger
item.dc:creator: The Verge
item.description: Oregon Attorney General Dan Rayfield had been seeking documents from Paramount related to its takeover of Warner Bros. Discovery. Rayfield also asked a state circuit court judge to delay the closing of the deal by 60 days so that his office could review the documents. But according to Deadline and V

item.title: 2027: Why I picked Bintu Konto as running mate – LP Presidential Candidate

item.title: Ex-Liverpool Manager To Replace Nagelsmann As Germany Coach
item.dc:creator: The Whistler
item.description: Jürgen Klopp has reached an agreement in principle to become the new head coach of Germany’s men’s national team. The former Liverpool boss met senior German football association (DFB) officials in New York on Friday. While the DFB said more talks were planned next week and an agreement

item.title: Noskova recovers to win maiden Wimbledon title after six Championship points
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Linda Noskova sealed her maiden Grand Slam title as she became the third Czech women's Wimbledon champion in four years with victory over compatriot Karolina Muchova on Saturday - but only after overcoming a major wobble.

item.title: 'Naive' England toil in Women's Test as India dominate at Lord's
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: England are facing an almighty battle to avoid defeat in the first Women's Test at Lord's after India dominated day two of the four-day fixture.

item.title: ‘Every Nigerian should register, obtain National Identity Number’ — Remi Tinubu
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: Nigeria’s First Lady, Oluremi Tinubu, has called on Nigerians who are yet to register for a National Identity Number (NIN) to do so, saying accurate population records are essential for effective national planning and improved service delivery. In a message to mark this year’s World Popu

item.title: Gov. Yusuf Congratulates VP Shettima on Emergence as Tinubu’s 2027 Running Mate
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Kano State Governor, Abba Kabir Yusuf, has congratulated Vice President Kashim Shettima on his emergence as the running mate to President Bola Ahmed Tinubu for the 2027 presidential election. The governor paid a courtesy visit to the Vice President on Friday night at Aguda House in the Presidential

item.title: Osun: Police begin probe of viral video of Ibuaje
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: The Osun State Police Command has commenced an investigation into a viral social media video showing a building in the Ibuaje Community of Osogbo, following concerns raised by its content and circulation online. In a statement issued on Saturday by the Police Public Relations Officer, DSP

item.title: Peller, Jarvis announce wedding date [VIDEO]
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: Popular Nigerian TikTok creators Hamzat Habeeb Adelaja, popularly known as Peller, and Amadou Elizabeth Aminata, known as Jarvis, have announced that their white wedding will hold on 1 August 2026. They both made the announcement in a video on their verified social media pages on Saturday.

item.dc:creator: Completesports
item.description: El-Kanemi Warriors were crowned champions of the 2026 President Federation Cup after edging Ikorodu City 1-0 in a tense final at the Stephen Keshi Stadium, Asaba, on Saturday. The decisive moment came in the 13th minute when Muktar Ismail calmly converted from the penalty spot, a goal that ultimatel

item.title: AfriSAFE lauds Ghana president’s leadership on post-flood sanitation drive
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: Pan-African safety advocacy platform, AfriSAFE has commended Ghana’s President, John Dramani Mahama, for his leadership and personal participation in the country’s post-flood clean-up exercise. item.title: Transfers: Wolves’ stance revealed as Trabzonspor continue pursuit of Arokodare
item.dc:creator: Soccernet NG
item.description: Wolves have made their position on Super Eagles striker Tolu Arokodare clear amid growing interest from Turkish side Trabzonspor and several other European clubs, Soccernet.ng reports. Arokodare's future has been the subject of speculation following Wolves' relegation from the Premier League to the

item.title: VIDEO: Don’t just buy cars, help the poor — Tinubu’s wife tells Burna Boy, Davido, Asake, others
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: Nigeria’s First Lady, Senator Oluremi Tinubu, has urged popular Nigerian musicians, including Asake, Burna Boy and Davido, to channel part of their wealth into charitable causes, saying they should establish foundations and support vulnerable Nigerians instead of focusing only on luxury lifestyles.

item.title: Smart glasses without a camera? Even Realities bets productivity beats recording everyone
item.dc:creator: TechCrunch
item.description: The glasses are targeted at people who might be constantly in meetings, giving presentations, and traveling to countries where different languages are spoken.

item.title: Billy Loughnane steers Comanche Brave to July Cup glory
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Billy Loughnane’s exceptional season continued at Newmarket on Saturday as he steered Irish raider Comanche Brave to a brilliant sprinting success in the Al Basti Equiworld, Dubai July Cup Stakes.

item.title: Arsenal Considering Re-signing Former Gunners Star
item.dc:creator: Completesports
item.description: Arsenal are interested in re-signing Dinos Mavropanos after the Greece international was relegated with West Ham. Mavropanos, 28, is wanted by several clubs and could be sold as part of a fire sale at the London Stadium. The defender is no stranger to the Gunners, who bought him from Greek club PAS

item.title: Lagos police arrest five suspected cultists terrorising Apapa, Ijora areas
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: Operatives of the Lagos State Police Command have arrested five suspected cultists alleged to be terrorising residents of Apapa, Ijora and Badia areas of the state. The post Lagos police arrest five suspected cultists terrorising Apapa, Ijora areas appeared first on The Sun Nigeria.

item.title: US lawmaker slams Israeli army after settlers detain him on Palestine trip
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: Lawmaker Khanna accuses soldiers of supporting the settlers, warning that Israeli forces made a 'huge mistake'.

item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: Nigeria’s First Lady, Senator Oluremi Tinubu, on Tuesday, commissioned two state projects and launched an empowerment scheme for more than 800 women during a one-day working visit to Kogi State. The visit began with the commissioning of the newly completed Kogi State Treasury House and a Primary Hea

item.title: Venezuela quake death toll passes 4,300 as scale of recovery effort looms large
item.dc:creator: The Guardian
item.description: Nearly 17,000 injured and thousands more listed as missing amid calls by president Delcy Rodríguez and UN for financial helpThe death toll in Venezuela’s devastating twin earthquakes has passed 4,300, the government said on Saturday.At least 4,333 people were killed and 16,740 injured in the back-to
